overall.description: A cinematic exploration sequence from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the Temple of Artemis Skyrna at night. The player character moves from the interior chamber with its central cult statue, through a geometric-screened doorway, and out onto the temple grounds with views of the coast and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior temple chamber with central cult statue

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the large marble statue of Artemis, examining it from different angles while remaining inside the temple

entered.detail: large marble cult statue of Artemis with a deer, centrally positioned in the temple chamber
red and white checkered marble tile flooring covering the temple interior
tall stone support columns along the temple walls
faded red and blue murals on the interior walls
doorway leading to outside with blue night light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside the Temple of Artemis, focusing on a monumental marble statue of the goddess with a deer. The camera circles the statue, revealing checkered marble floors, painted walls, and the wooden ceiling structure. The space is dimly lit with hanging lanterns, creating a solemn atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exit corridor with geometric lattice screens

events.description: passing through the interior doorway with geometric lattice screens into the exterior night environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple exit, transitioning from the interior chamber to the outside grounds

entered.detail: doorway with black and white geometric Greek key pattern screens
tall dark cypress tree silhouetted against the night sky visible through the exit
cobblestone pathway leading away from the temple into the grounds

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the temple exit, passing through a doorway adorned with geometric lattice screens. The lighting shifts from artificial interior to the blue hues of night outside, with cypress trees and stone pathways becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exterior grounds with Doric colonnade

events.description: full moon becomes visible above the temple roof as the camera turns, illuminating the scene with pale light

agents.ego_description: walking around the temple exterior, examining the architecture and surroundings while moving along the stone pathways

entered.detail: red-painted Doric columns on the temple exterior facade
stone retaining wall along the temple grounds perimeter
burning torches providing warm orange light against the cool blue night
distant mountain range visible against the starry night sky

segments.scene_description: Now outside, the camera explores the temple grounds under the night sky. The red Doric columns of the temple exterior stand against the darkness, while torches cast flickering light. The full moon appears above the temple roof as the camera turns, revealing mountain silhouettes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside terrace with votive statues and sea view

events.description: approaching the line of ancient kouros statues near the cliff edge overlooking the sea

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking past the ancient Greek kouros statues toward the coastal overlook at the cliff edge

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing near the cliff edge who then walk away toward the overlook

entered.detail: ancient Greek standing male statues (kouroi) dressed in red robes positioned along the cliff
burning fire pit situated between the standing statues
view of the dark sea and distant coastline under the night sky
rectangular stone altar blocks positioned near the statues

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a cliffside terrace where ancient kouros statues stand sentinel near a burning fire pit. Two robed NPCs are visible near the edge overlooking the sea. The camera moves past the statues, revealing the coastal view and distant mountains under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the solemn, dimly lit interior of a temple out into a vast, moonlit coastal landscape. It begins by circling a monumental marble statue of the goddess and her deer, gliding across checkered floors beneath a wooden ceiling illuminated by hanging lanterns. As the camera moves toward the exit, it passes through geometric lattice screens, causing the artificial interior light to shift into the deep blue hues of the night. The scene then expands across the temple grounds, moving past red Doric columns and flickering torches before turning upward to reveal a full moon and distant mountain silhouettes. Finally, the camera approaches a cliffside terrace with sentinel kouros statues and a burning fire pit, gliding past robed figures to reveal a wide view of the sea and starry sky.
